pass_epa_per_play_z.what: Average EPA on pass attempts — the core efficiency metric
pass_epa_per_play_z.limits: Influenced by receiver quality and OL protection.

yards_per_attempt_z.limits: Doesn't account for sacks or throwaways.

td_rate_z.limits: Red zone opportunities vary by team.

int_rate_z.how: INTs / attempts. Inverted so positive z = fewer picks.
int_rate_z.limits: Drops and tipped balls can inflate INT counts.

completion_pct_z.limits: Short passes inflate completion % without adding value.

passing_cpoe_z.what: Completion % over expected — accuracy vs difficulty
passing_cpoe_z.how: Actual completion % minus expected completion % based on throw difficulty.
passing_cpoe_z.limits: Model may not capture all situational factors.

sack_rate_z.how: Sacks / (attempts + sacks). Inverted so positive z = fewer sacks.
sack_rate_z.limits: OL quality is a major factor.

air_yards_per_attempt_z.what: Average air yards per attempt — throw depth
air_yards_per_attempt_z.limits: Scheme-dependent. West Coast offenses throw shorter.

yac_per_completion_z.limits: Heavily influenced by receiver ability and scheme.

turnover_rate_z.limits: Includes fumbles which may be OL-related.

rush_yards_per_game_z.limits: Designed runs vs scrambles not distinguished.

rush_epa_per_carry_z.limits: Small sample for pocket passers. Kneeldowns can deflate.

passing_yards_per_game_z.limits: Volume stat — garbage time and blowouts inflate.

passing_tds_per_game_z.limits: Red zone usage varies by team and game script.
